name: FarmLogs (Bushel) Farm Management API
what_it_does: FarmLogs (now Bushel Farm) REST API for farm management software and grain marketing platform. Enables AI agents to manage crop production records and field-level activity logging for agronomic record keeping, handle grain inventory and grain marketing workflow for commodity risk management, access yield and performance benchmarking data for farm analytics, retrieve planting records and seeding data for crop production documentation, manage field observation and scouting data for agronomy workflow, handle contract management and grain delivery scheduling for commodity marketing, access cash flow and farm financial tracking for farm profitability management, retrieve insurance acreage reporting data for crop insurance compliance, manage field-level rainfall and weather tracking for risk management, and integrate farm records with cooperative, lender, and crop insurance platforms.
use_cases: Recording field activities from farm management agents
Managing grain marketing from commodity agents
Tracking yields from crop analytics agents
Reporting acreage for crop insurance from compliance agents
not_for: Precision agriculture with variable-rate prescription focus
Large commercial farms requiring enterprise-grade field management
Non-row-crop operations without grain marketing focus
best_when: A small to mid-size grain farmer or grain cooperative using FarmLogs/Bushel wants AI agents to automate farm record keeping, grain marketing, yield tracking, and crop insurance reporting.
avoid_when: PRODUCT TRANSITION RISK: FarmLogs was acquired by Bushel and rebranded as Bushel Farm — API may have changed during transition; verify current API availability and documentation. Crop insurance acreage reporting via API must match FSA/RMA compliance requirements; automated reporting errors create crop insurance claim denial risk. FarmLogs was primarily a consumer-grade farm app; API maturity may not meet enterprise integration requirements.

auth.notes: FarmLogs/Bushel uses OAuth 2.0. No native webhooks. REST API with JSON. Grand Forks, North Dakota HQ (Bushel). Bushel acquired FarmLogs (2022). Bushel is a grain supply chain platform. FarmLogs founded 2012 (Ann Arbor, Michigan). 100,000+ farm users historically. Grain marketing and farm records focus. Competes with Trimble Farmer Core, Climate Corporation, and CNH AFS for farm management software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free basic tier with acreage limits
pricing.notes: Grand Forks, North Dakota. Bushel acquired FarmLogs 2022. Bushel grain supply chain platform. 100,000+ farm users. Small to mid-size grain farmer focus. Competes with Trimble, Climate Corp, and John Deere Operations Center for farm management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: PRODUCT TRANSITION RISK: FarmLogs rebranded to Bushel Farm after acquisition; API may have changed or been restructured; verify current API status with Bushel
Crop insurance FSA compliance — automated acreage reporting for crop insurance must match RMA/FSA requirements; automated submission errors create crop insurance claim denial
No webhooks — farm activity event notification requires polling; no native event push
Consumer-grade API maturity — FarmLogs was consumer farm app before acquisition; API may lack enterprise reliability, monitoring, and SLA commitments
Farm data ownership — AAFC Farm Data Principles require farmer consent for data sharing; automated data export must respect farmer ownership and consent settings
Grain marketing integration — Bushel grain marketing features require grain elevator/cooperative connectivity; grain contract execution requires backend grain system integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Farm management. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Farm records and grain marketing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Farm management. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Farm and crop data.
